name: imr1_innermost_repeats
description: Innermost repeats imr1L and imr1R of centromere 1. ~5 kb each side, partially repetitive sequence containing a cluster of tRNA genes that act as the cnt/otr chromatin boundary (Mis6-Cnp1 inside; H3K9me-Swi6 outside).
expected_copy_count: 2 copies per centromere (L and R, inverted)
